title: ResourcePack
description: This is a handy plugin for Minecraft that allows server admins to easily manage resource packs using the “/rp” command.
body:
🎨 JResourcePack — Simple Resource Pack Manager

  Easily manage and distribute resource packs on your Minecraft server
  using a simple command and configuration.

JResourcePack allows server administrators to configure and deliver
resource packs directly to players using a clean and efficient system.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

✨ Features

📦 Easy Resource Pack Installation

-   Install resource packs using a direct download link
-   No manual installation required for players
-   Fully automated resource pack delivery
-   Simple and reliable system

------------------------------------------------------------------------

⚙️ Command-Based Management

Players can manage resource packs using:

    /rp

This command allows players to:

-   Download the resource pack
-   Apply the resource pack
-   Update resource packs instantly

------------------------------------------------------------------------

🔧 Flexible Configuration

Server admins can easily configure resource packs:

    resource-pack-url: "https://example.com/resourcepack.zip"

Benefits:

-   Quickly switch resource packs
-   Easy updates
-   No server restart required (with reload)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

🔐 Permissions

    jresourcepack.use

Allows players to use:

    /rp

    jresourcepack.reload

Allows reloading plugin configuration

------------------------------------------------------------------------

🔄 Reload Command

    /rp reload

Reloads the plugin configuration safely

------------------------------------------------------------------------

🚀 Benefits

-   Easy installation
-   Simple configuration
-   Lightweight and fast
-   No performance impact
-   Reliable and stable

------------------------------------------------------------------------

📊 Statistics

bStats: https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/JResourcePack/21826

------------------------------------------------------------------------
